Hub Home > Website & Conversion > SEO Page Optimizer

SEO Page Optimizer

Optimize any existing page for search — analyze current content against a target keyword, rewrite weak sections, generate meta tags, suggest internal links, and create a structured data recommendation. Works on blog posts, service pages, product pages, or landing pages.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Paste both your current page content AND the top 3 ranking pages for your target keyword. The AI will identify exactly what the ranking pages have that yours is missing.

SEO on-page optimization keywords meta tags structured data search ranking

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank for a target keyword.

<current_page>
[PASTE YOUR FULL PAGE CONTENT]
</current_page>

<target>
Primary keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Secondary...
You are an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank for a target keyword.

<current_page>
[PASTE YOUR FULL PAGE CONTENT]
</current_page>

<target>
Primary keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Secondary...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank for a target keyword.

<current_page>
[PASTE YOUR FULL PAGE CONTENT]
</current_page>

<target>
Primary keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 RELATED TERMS]
Page type: [blog post / service page / product page / landing page]
Current ranking position: [if known, or "not ranking"]
Business: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Target audience: [WHO]
</target>

Deliver:

1. **Content gap analysis** — what is the page missing that top-ranking pages likely cover? List 5-8 subtopics or questions to address.

2. **Title tag** — optimized, under 60 characters, keyword near front.

3. **Meta description** — compelling, under 155 characters, includes keyword and CTA.

4. **H1 rewrite** — if the current one is weak.

5. **Subheading structure** — recommended H2/H3 outline with keywords naturally placed.

6. **Body copy improvements** — rewrite the weakest 2-3 paragraphs for keyword relevance and readability. Mark additions vs rewrites.

7. **Internal linking suggestions** — 3-5 internal link opportunities with anchor text.

8. **Structured data** — JSON-LD schema recommendation for this page type (FAQ, HowTo, Product, Article, etc.).

9. **Image optimization** — alt text suggestions for any described images.

Keep the page natural and reader-first. No keyword stuffing.
Notes: Claude handles long content well in XML tags. For best results, also paste the content of pages currently ranking #1-3 for your keyword inside a <competitors> tag so Claude can do a real gap analysis.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank higher for a target keyword.

My page content:
[PASTE FULL CONTENT]

Target keyword:...
Act as an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank higher for a target keyword.

My page content:
[PASTE FULL CONTENT]

Target keyword:...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an SEO specialist. Optimize my page to rank higher for a target keyword.

My page content:
[PASTE FULL CONTENT]

Target keyword: [KEYWORD]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 TERMS]
Page type: [blog / service / product / landing]
Current ranking: [position or "not ranking"]
Business: [TYPE]
Audience: [WHO]

Give me:
1. Content gaps — 5-8 subtopics missing vs what top pages cover
2. Title tag (under 60 chars, keyword front-loaded)
3. Meta description (under 155 chars, keyword + CTA)
4. H1 rewrite if needed
5. Recommended H2/H3 structure with keywords
6. Rewrite the weakest 2-3 paragraphs
7. 3-5 internal linking suggestions with anchor text
8. JSON-LD structured data recommendation
9. Image alt text suggestions

Reader-first. No keyword stuffing.
Notes: ChatGPT with web browsing can analyze the actual top-ranking pages for your keyword in real-time. Ask it to "search for [keyword] and compare the top 3 results to my page."
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Optimize my page for search ranking.

**My page content:**
[PASTE CONTENT]

**Target keyword:** [KEYWORD]
**Secondary keywords:**...
Optimize my page for search ranking.

**My page content:**
[PASTE CONTENT]

**Target keyword:** [KEYWORD]
**Secondary keywords:**...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Optimize my page for search ranking.

**My page content:**
[PASTE CONTENT]

**Target keyword:** [KEYWORD]
**Secondary keywords:** [2-3 TERMS]
**Page type:** [blog / service / product / landing]
**Current ranking:** [position or "not ranking"]
**Business:** [TYPE]
**Audience:** [WHO]

Search for my target keyword and analyze what the top-ranking pages include, then:
1. Content gaps — what am I missing vs top rankers?
2. Optimized title tag (60 chars)
3. Meta description (155 chars)
4. H1 rewrite
5. H2/H3 structure
6. Rewrite weakest 2-3 paragraphs
7. Internal link suggestions
8. JSON-LD structured data
9. Image alt text

Keep it natural, no keyword stuffing.
Notes: Gemini with search grounding is the strongest model for this task — it can analyze actual SERP results and competitor content in real-time, making the gap analysis factual rather than assumed.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me optimize my page for a target keyword.

Page content: [PASTE CONTENT]

Keyword:...
Help me optimize my page for a target keyword.

Page content: [PASTE CONTENT]

Keyword:...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me optimize my page for a target keyword.

Page content: [PASTE CONTENT]

Keyword: [TARGET]
Secondary keywords: [2-3 TERMS]
Page type: [blog / service / product / landing]
Current ranking: [position or "not ranking"]
Business: [TYPE]

I need:
1. Content gaps vs top-ranking pages
2. Title tag (60 chars)
3. Meta description (155 chars)
4. H1 rewrite
5. H2/H3 outline
6. Rewrite weakest paragraphs
7. Internal link suggestions
8. JSON-LD structured data
9. Image alt text

Natural writing, no stuffing.
Notes: Copilot in Edge can view both your page and competitor pages side-by-side for real-time comparison. It can also pull Search Console data if connected to your Microsoft account.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the SEO Page Optimizer prompt do?

Optimize any existing page for search — analyze current content against a target keyword, rewrite weak sections, generate meta tags, suggest internal links, and create a structured data recommendation. Works on blog posts, service pages, product pages, or landing pages.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
